creator: james.wright@digital-chaos.com
text:
Created attachment 238561
apache-mesos.patch

The latest version of the devel/elfio dependency now requires C++14 for building. I have attached a patch to build apache-mesos with C++14, and also a fix for zlib detection within autotools configure.

However, bumping the C++ standard causes a new issue during linking which i'm not sure how to fix as it seems related to devel/grpc and it's dependency devel/abseil;

ld: error: ./.libs/libmesos.so: undefined reference to absl::lts_20220623::Mutex::~Mutex() [--no-allow-shlib-undefined
